author: AgentGuard
name: Possible Mythos-like AI Cyber-Agent Activity
description: Detects high-risk untrusted AI cyber-agent activity findings.
query: event.module: "ai_sentinel" and ai_sentinel.finding.type: ("ai_cyber_agent_activity" or "ai_vulnerability_research_agent" or "ai_exploit_development_activity" or "ai_sandbox_escape_research") and not ai_sentinel.allowed: true and ai_sentinel.risk.level: ("high" or "critical")
